pressure_heart.title: Check Pressure mod heart status — monitor cardiovascular health after the intensity of Ch13-14

sculk_cured.title: Confirm Sculk Sickness is cured (Sculk Sickness mod — use Ambrosia if at Stage 2+)

full_diet.title: Achieve maximum Diet mod coverage across all 5 food groups — the post-adventure nutritional baseline

subtitle.text: You are not invincible. You are prepared. Those are different things.

description: After the intensity of the End chapters, run a full health audit.
Pressure mod:
The heart health system tracks cardiovascular strain from combat and falls.
High-intensity periods (the dragon fight, Trigon, deep End) strain the heart.
Rest and normal activity allows recovery.
Check the Pressure UI to confirm you are in a safe range.
Sculk Sickness:
5 stages of infection from Sculk exposure in Ch08.
Stage 1-2: Minor debuffs. Stage 3-4: Significant debuffs. Stage 5: Dangerous.
Ambrosia cures it. Sculk Sickness can be carried for many chapters unnoticed.
Vile Herb (used for Cursed Eye in Ch12) is also connected to this system.
Confirm you are at Stage 0 — cured.
Diet:
5 groups: grain, protein, fruit, vegetable, dairy.
Maximum coverage gives permanent stat bonuses.
After the End, your diet may be heavy on End foods and light on basics.
Rebalance it before Ch16.
→ Audit Pressure mod heart health [check]
→ Confirm Sculk Sickness is cured [check]
→ Achieve full 5-group Diet coverage [check]
